name: Spinach and Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crispy; set aside.
2. In a large pot, sauté onion over medium heat until softened.
3. Add chicken broth, diced potatoes, carrot, celery, white wine, thyme, sage, and pepper to the pot. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for about 20-25 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
5. Stir in spinach and cook until wilted.
6. Remove from heat; stir in milk. Adjust seasoning as needed.
7. Serve hot, garnished with parsley. If using chorizo, cook the sausage links first and slice them before adding to the soup.
